  1. Home

Informational assistant

Help choosing an adult diaper

Answer simple questions about mobility, size and usage. At the end, you will have a summary for the Mimo Senior team to review in WhatsApp.

Start the guideTalk directly on WhatsApp
  • Personal guidance
  • Confirmed quotation
  • Support in Panama

What this guide does and does not do

It organises practical information for a quotation. It does not diagnose, prescribe or replace a health professional’s assessment.

Step by step

Prepare your request for guidance

Step 1 of 9

  1. Who it is for
  2. Mobility
  3. Current need
  4. Diaper type
  5. Size
  6. Usage
  7. Delivery area
  8. Contact
  9. Summary
Who it is for

Mobility

Current need

Diaper type

Size

Measure waist and hips in centimetres and keep both values. The exact chart will be checked against the available product.
Usage

Delivery area

Contact

Summary

Review your summary

You can go back and edit any answer before opening WhatsApp.


    

  
FAQ
Frequently asked questions
What if I do not know the size?
Select “I do not know”. The guide explains which measurements can help compare the charts for available products.
Should I include medical information?
No. Do not send diagnoses, medical records or clinical images. Practical details such as mobility, size, usage and delivery area are normally enough for a quote.
Tell us what you need
We can help organise a one-time purchase, institutional quotation or flexible monthly plan.
Talk on WhatsApp
